title: sanamunda
intro: Sanamunda plant, also known as Phyllanthus niruri, is a tropical plant species native to Central and South America, commonly used as a medicinal herb. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its medicinal value. The health benefits of Sanamunda include its ability to treat liver and kidney disorders, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Sanamunda is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be consumed as a capsule or infused oil, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety in various preparations.
intro_study: According to "Phytotherapy research : PTR", sanamunda (also known as Sida cordifolia) benefits include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and hypoglycaemic activities.
